content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
niyalma hetu ulin be baharakv oqi bayan ojorakv sehebi
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the given Manchu sentence to English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it was the language of the Manchu people who ruled China during the Qing dynasty. Here is my translation based on the structure and vocabulary of the Manchu language:

### The people who are not of the same clan or lineage are not to be trusted. ###

Please note that translating from Manchu can be challenging due to the limited contemporary resources and the specific context in which the language was used. This translation is an interpretation based on the available knowledge and may not be entirely accurate.
